name: JoAi: List Documents

description.en: Retrieve documents from your agent's knowledge base. Filter by type to list only templates, or search by title. Returns paginated results.
description.de: Dokumente aus der Wissensdatenbank deines Agenten abrufen. Nach Typ filtern, z.B. nur Templates, oder nach Titel suchen. Liefert paginierte Ergebnisse.
description.es: Retrieve documents from your agent's knowledge base. Filter by type to list only templates, or search by title. Returns paginated results.
description.fr: Retrieve documents from your agent's knowledge base. Filter by type to list only templates, or search by title. Returns paginated results.
description.ro: Retrieve documents from your agent's knowledge base. Filter by type to list only templates, or search by title. Returns paginated results.
description.it: Retrieve documents from your agent's knowledge base. Filter by type to list only templates, or search by title. Returns paginated results.

bot: Use this when the user wants to see their documents or templates, or when a workflow needs to look up templates by type or search term.

inputs.name: Type

description.en: Filter by document type (text, template, pdf, html, markdown)
description.de: Nach Dokumenttyp filtern (text, template, pdf, html, markdown)
description.es: Filter by document type (text, template, pdf, html, markdown)
description.fr: Filter by document type (text, template, pdf, html, markdown)
description.ro: Filter by document type (text, template, pdf, html, markdown)
description.it: Filter by document type (text, template, pdf, html, markdown)

inputs.bot: Document type to filter by. Use 'template' to list only message templates. Omit for all types.

inputs.name: Search
inputs.bot: Search documents by title. Omit to return all.

inputs.name: Per Page
inputs.bot: Page size. Use up to 500 for bulk operations.
